mapper.insert: insert into lego_workflow_runs (id, workflow_id, status, idempotency_key, input) values (#{id}, #{workflowId}, #{status}, #{idempotencyKey}, cast(#{inputJson} as jsonb))
mapper.update: update lego_workflow_runs set status = 'RUNNING', started_at = now(), finished_at = null, error = null where id = #{runId}
update lego_workflow_runs set status = 'SUCCEEDED', output = cast(#{outputJson} as jsonb), finished_at = now() where id = #{runId}
update lego_workflow_runs set status = 'FAILED', error = #{error}, finished_at = now() where id = #{runId}
mapper.select: select id, workflow_id, status, idempotency_key, cast(input as text) as input_json, cast(output as text) as output_json, error, started_at, finished_at, created_at from lego_workflow_runs where id = #{id}
